Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/webinars.asp

# SBDC Live and Recorded Webinars Catalog

## Resource summary
The webinar page includes live and recorded webinars and filters by topic/format. Topics include Starting a Business, Marketing/Sales, AI Tools, Social Media, Managing a Business, Vision2Venture, Finances/Taxes, Loans, Certifications and Procurement, Legal Issues, Websites, Technology, Cybersecurity, Food and Restaurant, Spanish, International Trade, Non-Profit, and V2V Orientation.

## BOSS routing use
Use this when the entrepreneur wants education, classes, webinars, or event-based learning. If the issue is urgent or specific to the business, pair training with SBDC advising.

## Dynamic-content warning
Class dates and webinar titles change. Provide the official link and instruct the user to filter by location/topic/format rather than relying on stale dates.
